description:
This quiz assesses JavaScript proficiency across ES2015 to ES2022 features, testing knowledge of modern syntax, language enhancements, and best practices. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, offering a casual yet encouraging tone to motivate learners. The format is multiple‑choice and requires no registration, making it accessible for quick skill validation.
Topics: ES2015 (ES6) features, ES2020–ES2022 updates, Modern JavaScript syntax, Language enhancements and best practices
Audience: Developers with basic JavaScript experience who want to gauge and improve their understanding of recent ECMAScript standards.
